name.description: User-friendly endpoint name that represents the corresponding port.

port.description: The network port the service is listening on. NULL, when portRange is specified.

portRange.description: The network port range the service is listening on. NULL, when port is specified.

protocol.description: Supported network protocol (TCP, HTTP, or HTTPS).

is_public.description: True, if the endpoint is public, accessible from internet.

ingress_url.description: Endpoint URL accessible from the internet.
